description_long: This is a large, modern two-story house surrounded by dense evergreen trees, set on a grassy plot. The house features a flat roof with multiple levels and open terraces, and its exterior is primarily composed of brown brick and large glass windows. The front facade includes a prominent garage, a paved driveway, and a stone path leading to the main entrance. The rear of the house showcases expansive windows and a curved wall, likely designed to maximize natural light and views of the surrounding landscape. The property is bordered by tall coniferous trees, providing privacy and a natural setting. The overall design is contemporary, with clean lines and a focus on integration with the environment.
description: A large, modern two-story house with a flat roof, brown brick exterior, and expansive glass windows, surrounded by dense evergreen trees on a grassy lot.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, garage, driveway, and a stone path leading to the door, with the house framed by tall evergreen trees.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlighting the curved glass wall and large windows, with the house nestled among dense trees and open grassy space.
description_view_2: Rear view mostly obscured by trees, but the flat roof and upper story windows are visible above the treeline.
description_view_3: Back-side view showing the garage, rear entry, and more of the house's angular design, with trees densely packed around the property.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows and a curved glass wall
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a single door accessed by a stone path, with a small overhang and adjacent garage, set back from the driveway.
